description_long: This is a crumpled blue aluminum can featuring the iconic Pepsi branding, with the word 'PEPSI' in bold white letters and a large, stylized red, white, and blue globe logo. The can's surface is glossy and reflects light, with visible nutritional information and barcode printed in white on the upper section. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening, and the can appears partially crushed, giving it a distorted cylindrical shape. The sides display additional branding elements and product information, including recycling symbols and manufacturer details. The can's overall appearance suggests it is empty or partially empty, as indicated by the deformed structure. This object is commonly found as litter or recyclables in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or near vending machines.
description: A crumpled blue Pepsi can with bold branding, a silver pull-tab top, and visible nutritional labeling. The can is partially crushed, showing a glossy, reflective surface and detailed product information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent 'PEPSI' text and the red, white, and blue globe logo, with nutritional information visible on the upper rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the barcode, recycling symbols, and additional product details, with the can's crumpled shape more apparent.
description_view_2: Another front view similar to view 0, but with the logo and text slightly distorted due to the can's deformation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the barcode, recycling information, and the can's silver top with pull-tab.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, circular red, white, and blue globe logo with the word 'PEPSI' in bold white letters, located on the main body of the can.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the upper rim of the can, including a nutrition facts panel and barcode.
